overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a long dark coat and hat walking along a rainy wooden dock or pier. The environment features industrial wooden structures, cargo barrels, covered walkways, and steamboats docked alongside the pier, with consistent rainy overcast weather throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet wooden dock planks past rows of cargo barrels

large green-roofed wooden shelter structure at the end of the dock section
large open-air industrial warehouse structure with metal roofing on the right
wet wooden planking covering the dock surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open wooden dock during a rainstorm, passing rows of wooden barrels on the left. The green wooden shelter looms ahead while an industrial warehouse structure stands to the right. The sky is fully visible with dark overcast clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cargo handling area under green wooden shelter

exiting the green shelter into the open dock area with the octagonal booth

agents.ego_description: walking through the green wooden shelter passing dock workers handling cargo sacks

small octagonal wooden kiosk with decorative trim and pointed roof

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the green wooden shelter where dock workers stand near cargo sacks. The octagonal ticket booth becomes visible to the left as the character exits the shelter back into the rain. The space is partially covered with reduced rain exposure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area with cargo crates and industrial crane

approaching the entrance to the covered pier walkway with white pillars

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the octagonal ticket booth and turns left around stacked cargo crates near a large industrial metal crane. American flags wave in the wind as the character approaches the entrance to a long covered pier walkway with white pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pier walkway with river views and decorative bunting

rain intensity increases while walking under the covered roof with views of steamboats

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pier looking out at the riverboats docked alongside the water

entered.detail: long covered walkway with white wooden pillars and glass window panels overlooking the water

red and blue decorative fabric bunting strung along the railing
white painted wooden support pillars holding up the pier roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long covered pier walkway with white pillars and glass sides, decorated with red and blue bunting. Large steamboats are visible docked alongside the pier through the rain-streaked windows. The roof provides shelter from the intensifying rain as the character continues walking along the wooden planks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy industrial dock that gradually transitions from an open pier into a sheltered, ornate walkway. It begins with the character walking past rows of wooden barrels under a dark overcast sky, moving toward a looming green wooden shelter. As the character passes under this shelter and by dock workers with cargo sacks, the scene shifts toward an octagonal ticket booth before emerging back into the rain. The camera then follows the character around stacked cargo crates and a large industrial metal crane, passing waving American flags before turning toward a long covered pier. Finally, the movement leads inside a glass-sided walkway with white pillars and red and blue bunting, where large steamboats are visible through rain-streaked windows.
